description: A community-published opinionated path with optional verification requirements. Recommendations are declarative guidance; orchestrators do not enforce them.

main.description: A community states: for this situation, we recommend this lens path, subject to these preconditions and caveats. Consumers adopt or ignore.

conditions.description: Free-text description of when this recommendation applies. Matching is community judgment, not machine logic.

lensPath.description: Ordered sequence of lenses to compose. Length 1 means a single recommended lens.

annotations.description: Why this path, how to use it, known strengths.

requiredVerifications.description: Verification kinds this recommendation assumes are in place.

preconditions.description: Assumptions the consumer must check before adopting.
